headline: VICI Properties Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
summary: NEW YORK, June 04, 2026--VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) ("VICI Properties") announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per share of common stock for the period from April 1, 2026 to June 30, 2026. The dividend will be payable on July 9, 2026 to stockholders of record as of the close of business on June 18, 2026.
